endpoints.label: Batch Create Row

fields.label: Host
fields.description: Host of your Baserow server, e.g. app.example.com (no https:// prefix)

fields.label: Database Name or ID
fields.description: Database to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Table Name or ID
fields.description: Table to operate on. Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

fields.label: Data to Send
fields.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

fields.label: Inputs to Ignore
fields.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

fields.label: Rows
fields.description: (JSON object; supported keys: rowValues, rowValues.id, rowValues.fieldsUi)

endpoints.description: Create up to 200 rows in one request
